overall.description: A stationary view of a medieval stone fireplace with a burning fire inside a castle common room. A translucent ghostly figure moves slowly on the left side of the frame. High-quality game engine footage with warm firelight illuminating the carved stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle common room with large fireplace

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the fireplace and surrounding architecture

notable_agents.action: translucent ghostly figure in robes standing and shifting position near the stone archway

entered.detail: large arched stone fireplace with burning fire and brick interior
intricately carved wooden mantelpiece above the fireplace
iron cauldron suspended over the fire by a hook
stone doorway leading to an adjacent corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary, focused on a grand stone fireplace with a warm burning fire in a medieval castle interior. A translucent ghostly figure stands to the left near a stone archway, occasionally shifting position. The carved wooden mantel and hanging cauldron are prominent features in the firelight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze upon a medieval hearth where the flickering warmth of a fire contrasts with a chilling supernatural presence. It begins focused on a grand stone fireplace, highlighting the intricate carvings of the wooden mantel and a heavy hanging cauldron illuminated by the orange glow. As the fire crackles, the camera captures a translucent ghostly figure standing silently to the left near a stone archway. The scene remains poised in this stillness, with the ghost occasionally shifting its position within the dancing shadows of the castle interior.
